qr_hint.description: solana:{address} URI for QR code generation

VendorSummaryDto.description: Lightweight shape returned by the vendor search endpoint

PeptideSummaryDto.description: Lightweight shape used in wizard dropdowns

value.description: total_usd for contributors; resolved_count for creators

file_url.description: Pre-signed S3 URL, TTL from S3_SIGNED_URL_TTL_SECONDS

effective_lock_threshold_usd.description: Effective threshold for locking: min(funding_threshold_usd, global min_funding_threshold_usd)

GlobalMinimumsConfig.description: Global platform minimums — mirrors the 'global_minimums' Configuration row.

deposit_conversion_fee_bps.description: Basis points charged on USDC/PyUSD deposits for currency conversion. 50 = 0.5%.

info.title: Peptide Crowdfunding Platform API
info.description: API documentation for the Peptide Crowdfunding BFF service

get.description:
GET /vendors/search?q=
Debounced vendor name search for wizard combobox.
Returns non-rejected vendors only.

GET /vendors — admin only
Full list with optional status filter.

delete.description: DELETE /vendors/:id — admin, blocked if samples attached

post.description:
POST /vendors/submit
User submits a new vendor for review (status=pending).
Campaign wizard proceeds immediately; public pages show "⚠ Unverified".

get.description: GET /vendors/:id/campaign-count — admin, returns count for suspension warning

delete.description:
DELETE /tests/:id — permanently deletes the test type.
Guard: fails with 409 if any lab-test records (active or inactive) reference it.
Disable the test and remove it from all labs before calling this.

get.description: GET /tests/:testId/claim-templates — list claim templates for a test

post.description: POST /tests/:testId/claim-templates — create a new claim template

get.description:
GET /peptides
Returns all active peptides. Used by the wizard for in-memory fuzzy search.

GET /peptides/all — admin or moderator (user_submitted_data_approver)
Returns all peptides including unreviewed (is_active=false).

post.description:
POST /peptides/submit
User submits a new peptide for review (is_active=false).
Campaign wizard proceeds immediately; public pages show "⚠ Unreviewed Peptide".

delete.description: DELETE /peptides/:id — admin, blocked if FK'd to samples
DELETE /labs/:id — deactivates lab and all its tests (soft delete)

post.description:
POST /labs/:id/tests/:testId/delete — permanently deletes a disabled lab-test record.
Guard: lab-test must already be inactive; fails with 409 if still active.

POST /labs/:id/delete — permanently deletes the lab.
Guard: fails with 409 if any lab-test records (active or inactive) still exist.

get.description: GET /campaigns/verification-code — spec §9.13 (preview only; 5 req/min per user)

post.description: POST /auth/logout — spec §9.1 — deletes all active refresh tokens

get.description: GET /admin/coas — list all COAs with optional status filter

post.description:
POST /admin/consolidate — swap USDC → USDT on master wallet via Jupiter.
Only executes if USDC balance >= CONSOLIDATION_THRESHOLD_USDC.
Requires admin claim.

get.description: GET /admin/treasury — master wallet on-chain snapshot + fee exposure + ledger totals
